meaning: adj.残断的,多梗株的,株状的,粗短的
examples: I stubbed my toe on the step.
I stubbed my toes against a table leg.
He stubbed out the cigarette on the floor.
Just that, nothing else, but my grandmother nodded and stubbed out her cigarette on the glasstop table.
The sandal had breathability and ankle support, plus a guard to prevent stubbed toes and improve the wearer's balance.
